name: @mizchi/pprof-tools
description: Host imports for running MoonBit-compiled wasm-gc / wasm guests under Node. The pprof conversion utilities that used to live here (cpuprofile‚Üípprof, firefox‚Üípprof, MoonBit demangle) moved to the Rust crates `cpuprofile-to-pprof`, `firefox-to-pprof`, `moonbit-demangle`, and are exposed by the `moon-pprof` CLI.
